kalshi_question: Will Trump win the 2028 Presidential Election?
poly_question: Trump to win 2028 US Presidential Election
kalshi_rules: Resolves Yes if Trump wins the certified Electoral College vote.
poly_rules: Resolves Yes if Trump wins the 2028 US Presidential Election.

description: Same CPI event but different thresholds — heuristic sees numeric subset
kalshi_question: Will CPI be above 3.0% in March 2026?
poly_question: Will CPI be above 3.5% in March 2026?
kalshi_rules: Resolves based on BLS CPI-U data for March 2026.
poly_rules: Resolves based on BLS CPI data release.
notes: 3.0 < 3.5 so heuristic correctly sees a_subset_b or b_subset_a

kalshi_question: What will core CPI be for April 2026?
poly_question: What will headline CPI be for April 2026?
kalshi_rules: Resolves based on BLS core CPI-U data.
poly_rules: Resolves based on BLS headline CPI data.
notes: Core vs headline is a known keyword mismatch

kalshi_question: Will the Republican win the Ohio Senate race in 2026?
poly_question: Republican to win 2026 Ohio Senate election
kalshi_rules: Resolves based on certified election results.
poly_rules: Resolves based on official election results.

kalshi_question: Will the Democrat win the Ohio Senate race in 2026?
poly_question: Will the Democrat win the Michigan Senate race in 2026?
kalshi_rules: Resolves based on Ohio certified results.
poly_rules: Resolves based on Michigan certified results.
notes: Ohio vs Michigan are disjoint regions

kalshi_question: Will GDP growth exceed 2% YoY in Q2 2026?
poly_question: Will GDP growth exceed 2% QoQ in Q2 2026?
kalshi_rules: Resolves based on BLS year-over-year GDP growth.
poly_rules: Resolves based on BLS quarter-over-quarter GDP growth.
notes: YoY vs QoQ is a known keyword mismatch

kalshi_rules: Resolves based on BLS CPI data.
poly_rules: Resolves based on NBA finals results.
